texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: SUMMARY OF BENEFITS
texts.text: SUMMARY OF BENEFITS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Association of Washington Business - Plan 2 WA385 12/1/202 5
texts.text: Association of Washington Business - Plan 2 WA385 12/1/202 5

texts.label: text
texts.orig: * Benefits for TMJ, implant surgery, and orthognathic surgery have a benefit maximum, if covered.  ** Dental implantsupported prosthetics (crowns, bridges, and dentures) are not a covered benefit.   *** Copay credited towards the Comprehensive Orthodontia Treatment copay if patient accepts treatment plan.
texts.text: * Benefits for TMJ, implant surgery, and orthognathic surgery have a benefit maximum, if covered.  ** Dental implantsupported prosthetics (crowns, bridges, and dentures) are not a covered benefit.   *** Copay credited towards the Comprehensive Orthodontia Treatment copay if patient accepts treatment plan.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Underwritten by Willamette Dental of Washington, Inc.
texts.text: Underwritten by Willamette Dental of Washington, Inc.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Presented are just some of the most common procedures covered in your plan. The certificate of coverage contains a complete description of covered benefits and copays.
texts.text: Presented are just some of the most common procedures covered in your plan. The certificate of coverage contains a complete description of covered benefits and copays.

texts.label: page_footer
texts.orig: Administrative Office: 6950 NE Campus Way, Hillsboro, OR 97124 028-WA(7/20)a
texts.text: Administrative Office: 6950 NE Campus Way, Hillsboro, OR 97124 028-WA(7/20)a

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: EXCLUSIONS AND LIMITATIONS
texts.text: EXCLUSIONS AND LIMITATIONS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This is only a summary. The certificate of coverage contains a complete description of the limitations and exclusions.
texts.text: This is only a summary. The certificate of coverage contains a complete description of the limitations and exclusions.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Exclusions
texts.text: Exclusions

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Bone grafting.
texts.text: Bone grafting.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Bridges, crowns, dentures, or prosthetic devices requiring multiple treatment dates or fittings if the prosthetic item is installed or delivered more than 60 days after termination of coverage.
texts.text: Bridges, crowns, dentures, or prosthetic devices requiring multiple treatment dates or fittings if the prosthetic item is installed or delivered more than 60 days after termination of coverage.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    The completion or delivery of treatments or services performed or initiated prior to the effective date of coverage.
texts.text: The completion or delivery of treatments or services performed or initiated prior to the effective date of coverage.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Cone beam CT X-rays and tomographic surveys.
texts.text: Cone beam CT X-rays and tomographic surveys.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Dental implant-supported prosthetics or abutment-supported prosthetics (crowns, bridges, and dentures).
texts.text: Dental implant-supported prosthetics or abutment-supported prosthetics (crowns, bridges, and dentures).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    A dental implant surgically placed prior to the member's effective date of coverage that has not received final restoration or a dental implant for treatment of a primary or transitional dentition.
texts.text: A dental implant surgically placed prior to the member's effective date of coverage that has not received final restoration or a dental implant for treatment of a primary or transitional dentition.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Endodontic therapy completed more than 60 days after termination of coverage.
texts.text: Endodontic therapy completed more than 60 days after termination of coverage.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Eposteal, transosteal, endodontic endosseous, or mini dental implants.
texts.text: Eposteal, transosteal, endodontic endosseous, or mini dental implants.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Exams or consultations needed solely in connection with a service not listed as covered.
texts.text: Exams or consultations needed solely in connection with a service not listed as covered.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Experimental or investigational services and related exams or consultations.
texts.text: Experimental or investigational services and related exams or consultations.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Full mouth reconstruction, including the extensive restoration of the mouth with crowns, bridges, or implants; and occlusal rehabilitation, including crowns, bridges, or implants used for the purpose of splinting, altering vertical dimension, restoring occlusions or correcting attrition, abrasion, or erosion.
texts.text: Full mouth reconstruction, including the extensive restoration of the mouth with crowns, bridges, or implants; and occlusal rehabilitation, including crowns, bridges, or implants used for the purpose of splinting, altering vertical dimension, restoring occlusions or correcting attrition, abrasion, or erosion.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Hospitalization care outside of a dental office for dental procedures, physician services, or facility fees.
texts.text: Hospitalization care outside of a dental office for dental procedures, physician services, or facility fees.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Maintenance, repair, replacement, or completion of an existing implant that was started or placed by a nonparticipating provider without a referral from a Willamette Dental Group provider.
texts.text: Maintenance, repair, replacement, or completion of an existing implant that was started or placed by a nonparticipating provider without a referral from a Willamette Dental Group provider.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Maintenance, repair, replacement, or completion of an existing implant that was started or placed prior to the member's effective date of coverage.
texts.text: Maintenance, repair, replacement, or completion of an existing implant that was started or placed prior to the member's effective date of coverage.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Maxillofacial prosthetic services.
texts.text: Maxillofacial prosthetic services.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Nightguards.
texts.text: Nightguards.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Orthognathic surgery, unless listed as covered in the contract.
texts.text: Orthognathic surgery, unless listed as covered in the contract.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Personalized restorations.
texts.text: Personalized restorations.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Plastic, reconstructive, or cosmetic surgery and other services, which are primarily intended to improve, alter, or enhance appearance.
texts.text: Plastic, reconstructive, or cosmetic surgery and other services, which are primarily intended to improve, alter, or enhance appearance.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Prescription and over-the-counter drugs and pre-medications.
texts.text: Prescription and over-the-counter drugs and pre-medications.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Provider charges for a missed appointment or appointment cancelled without 24 hours prior notice.
texts.text: Provider charges for a missed appointment or appointment cancelled without 24 hours prior notice.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Replacement of lost, missing, or stolen dental appliances; replacement of dental appliances that are damaged due to abuse, misuse, or neglect.
texts.text: Replacement of lost, missing, or stolen dental appliances; replacement of dental appliances that are damaged due to abuse, misuse, or neglect.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Replacement of sound restorations.
texts.text: Replacement of sound restorations.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Services and related exams or consultations that are not within the prescribed treatment plan or are not recommended and approved by a Willamette Dental Group dentist.
texts.text: Services and related exams or consultations that are not within the prescribed treatment plan or are not recommended and approved by a Willamette Dental Group dentist.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Services and related exams or consultations to the extent they are not necessary for the diagnosis, care, or treatment of the condition involved.
texts.text: Services and related exams or consultations to the extent they are not necessary for the diagnosis, care, or treatment of the condition involved.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Services by any person other than a licensed dentist, denturist, hygienist, or dental assistant.
texts.text: Services by any person other than a licensed dentist, denturist, hygienist, or dental assistant.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Services for the diagnosis or treatment of temporomandibular joint disorders, unless listed as covered in the contract.
texts.text: Services for the diagnosis or treatment of temporomandibular joint disorders, unless listed as covered in the contract.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Services for the treatment of an injury or disease that is covered under workers' compensation or that are the employer's responsibility.
texts.text: Services for the treatment of an injury or disease that is covered under workers' compensation or that are the employer's responsibility.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Services for treatment of injuries sustained while practicing for or competing in a professional athletic contest.
texts.text: Services for treatment of injuries sustained while practicing for or competing in a professional athletic contest.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Services for treatment of intentionally self-inflicted injuries.
texts.text: Services for treatment of intentionally self-inflicted injuries.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Services for which coverage is available under any federal, state, or other governmental program, unless required by law.
texts.text: Services for which coverage is available under any federal, state, or other governmental program, unless required by law.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Services not listed as covered in the contract.
texts.text: Services not listed as covered in the contract.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Services where there is no evidence of pathology, dysfunction, or disease other than covered preventive services.
texts.text: Services where there is no evidence of pathology, dysfunction, or disease other than covered preventive services.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Limitations
texts.text: Limitations

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  If alternative services can be used to treat a condition, the service recommended by the Willamette Dental Group dentist is covered.
texts.text: If alternative services can be used to treat a condition, the service recommended by the Willamette Dental Group dentist is covered.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Services listed in the contract, which are provided to correct congenital or developmental malformations which impair functions of the teeth and supporting structures will be covered for dependent children if dental necessity has been established.
texts.text: Services listed in the contract, which are provided to correct congenital or developmental malformations which impair functions of the teeth and supporting structures will be covered for dependent children if dental necessity has been established.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    The retreatment of root canal therapy performed by a Willamette Dental Group dentist will be covered as part of the initial treatment for the first 24 months. The retreatment of root canal therapy performed by a non-participating provider will be subject to the applicable copays.
texts.text: The retreatment of root canal therapy performed by a Willamette Dental Group dentist will be covered as part of the initial treatment for the first 24 months. The retreatment of root canal therapy performed by a non-participating provider will be subject to the applicable copays.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    General anesthesia is covered with the copays specified in the contract, if: performed in a dental office, provided in conjunction with a covered service, and dentally necessary because the enrollee is under the age of 7, developmentally disabled, or physically handicapped.
texts.text: General anesthesia is covered with the copays specified in the contract, if: performed in a dental office, provided in conjunction with a covered service, and dentally necessary because the enrollee is under the age of 7, developmentally disabled, or physically handicapped.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    The services provided by a dentist in a hospital setting must meet the requirements in the contract to be covered.
texts.text: The services provided by a dentist in a hospital setting must meet the requirements in the contract to be covered.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    The replacement of an existing denture, crown, inlay, onlay, or other prosthetic appliance is covered if the appliance is more than 5 years old and replacement is dentally necessary.
texts.text: The replacement of an existing denture, crown, inlay, onlay, or other prosthetic appliance is covered if the appliance is more than 5 years old and replacement is dentally necessary.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·    Crowns, casts, or other indirect fabricated restorations are covered only if dentally necessary and if recommended by the Willamette Dental Group dentist.
texts.text: Crowns, casts, or other indirect fabricated restorations are covered only if dentally necessary and if recommended by the Willamette Dental Group dentist.
